HGSS.620.0000:
I am sorry.\f
Clair, our Gym Leader, entered
the Dragon’s Den behind the Gym.\f
I have no idea when our Leader
will return.
HGSS.620.0001:
Clair, our Gym Leader, is waiting
for you.\f
However, it would be impossible for
a run-of-the-mill Trainer to win.
HGSS.620.0002:
You defeated Clair?
That’s amazing!\f
I’ve never heard of her losing to
anyone other than Lance.
HGSS.620.0003:
No. Only chosen Trainers may train
here. Please leave.
HGSS.620.0004:
If Clair allows it, her grandfather--
our Master--will also.\f
You may enter.
HGSS.620.0005:
My radio’s busted?
Lately, I only get this weird signal.
HGSS.620.0006:
Arooo! Voices in my head!\f
Huh? I’m listening to my radio!
HGSS.620.0007:
Are you going to make your Pokémon
forget some moves?
HGSS.620.0008:
Those Trainers called Dragon Tamers
are all from Blackthorn City.
HGSS.620.0009:
Wow, you came through the Ice Path?\f
You must be a real hotshot Trainer!
HGSS.620.0010:
Blackthorn City
A Quiet Mountain Retreat
HGSS.620.0011:
Blackthorn City Pokémon Gym
Leader: Clair\r
The Blessed User of Dragon Pokémon
HGSS.620.0012:
Move Deleter and Move Tutor House\f
A Mysterious House Where You Can Make
Pokémon Forget and Remember Moves
HGSS.620.0014:
Trainer Tips\f
Wild Pokémon will appear regularly
if you don’t run, but walk quietly in the\r
tall grass.\f
If your party Pokémon are
tired, it is better to avoid running,\r
and go straight to a Pokémon Center.
